g.text: verify each cosigner sig vs its pk
deploy_id is derived from the WIRE signature
— on-chain identity, UNCHANGED. It is NOT the funding key.
Replay reconstructs the verified cosigner set and re-derives
funding_sig, so the settlement-debit map is BYTE-IDENTICAL
to play. Strict compound deploys key on the effective supply
— the pool the gate proves Σ≥Δ
against and debits IS the genesis-seeded wallet Σ⟦Ground(pk)⟧.
Pre-§D2.9 the wire-sig pool was always absent ⇒ never debited.
